_note: The scripts in .claude/hooks/ (scope-binding-check, observability-log, drift-detection) are vendored from the knowledge-base governance-hooks template. They are NOT wired as Claude Code hooks — Claude Code hook events are PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop/UserPromptSubmit/SessionStart, not pre-commit/post-commit/hourly. To actually fire these scripts, install them as git hooks (symlink into .git/hooks/) or run manually.
